name: shadcn
description: shadcn/ui component library CLI and related tooling commands

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest init
subcommands.description: Initialize shadcn/ui in your project. Sets up tailwind.config, globals.css, cn() utility, and components.json configuration

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add
subcommands.description: Add a shadcn/ui component to your project. Downloads the component source into your components directory

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest diff
subcommands.description: Check for differences between local component files and the shadcn/ui registry

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add accordion
subcommands.description: Add the Accordion component (Radix UI Accordion primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add alert
subcommands.description: Add the Alert component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add alert-dialog
subcommands.description: Add the AlertDialog component (Radix UI AlertDialog primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add aspect-ratio
subcommands.description: Add the AspectRatio component (Radix UI AspectRatio primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add avatar
subcommands.description: Add the Avatar component (Radix UI Avatar primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add badge
subcommands.description: Add the Badge component with badgeVariants

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add button
subcommands.description: Add the Button component with buttonVariants

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add calendar
subcommands.description: Add the Calendar component (react-day-picker)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add card
subcommands.description: Add the Card component with Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add carousel
subcommands.description: Add the Carousel component (Embla Carousel)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add checkbox
subcommands.description: Add the Checkbox component (Radix UI Checkbox primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add collapsible
subcommands.description: Add the Collapsible component (Radix UI Collapsible primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add command
subcommands.description: Add the Command component (cmdk)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add context-menu
subcommands.description: Add the ContextMenu component (Radix UI ContextMenu primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add dialog
subcommands.description: Add the Dialog component (Radix UI Dialog primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add drawer
subcommands.description: Add the Drawer component (vaul)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add dropdown-menu
subcommands.description: Add the DropdownMenu component (Radix UI DropdownMenu primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add form
subcommands.description: Add the Form component (react-hook-form + zod integration)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add hover-card
subcommands.description: Add the HoverCard component (Radix UI HoverCard primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add input
subcommands.description: Add the Input component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add label
subcommands.description: Add the Label component (Radix UI Label primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add menubar
subcommands.description: Add the Menubar component (Radix UI Menubar primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add navigation-menu
subcommands.description: Add the NavigationMenu component (Radix UI NavigationMenu primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add pagination
subcommands.description: Add the Pagination component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add popover
subcommands.description: Add the Popover component (Radix UI Popover primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add progress
subcommands.description: Add the Progress component (Radix UI Progress primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add radio-group
subcommands.description: Add the RadioGroup component (Radix UI RadioGroup primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add scroll-area
subcommands.description: Add the ScrollArea component (Radix UI ScrollArea primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add select
subcommands.description: Add the Select component (Radix UI Select primitive)

subcommands.description: Add the Separator component (Radix UI Separator primitive)

subcommands.description: Add the Sheet component (extends Dialog)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add skeleton
subcommands.description: Add the Skeleton loading placeholder component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add slider
subcommands.description: Add the Slider component (Radix UI Slider primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add switch
subcommands.description: Add the Switch component (Radix UI Switch primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add table
subcommands.description: Add the Table component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add tabs
subcommands.description: Add the Tabs component (Radix UI Tabs primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add textarea
subcommands.description: Add the Textarea component

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add toast
subcommands.description: Add the Toast and Toaster components (Radix UI Toast primitive)

subcommands.name: npx shadcn@latest add toggle
subcommands.description: Add the Toggle component (Radix UI Toggle primitive)

subcommands.name: npm install class-variance-authority
subcommands.description: Install class-variance-authority (CVA) for creating variant-based className utilities

subcommands.name: npm install clsx tailwind-merge
subcommands.description: Install clsx and tailwind-merge, the dependencies for the cn() utility function

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI Dialog primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI DropdownMenu primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-tooltip
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI Tooltip primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-accordion
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI Accordion primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-select
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI Select primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install @radix-ui/react-popover
subcommands.description: Install Radix UI Popover primitive directly

subcommands.name: npm install react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers zod
subcommands.description: Install react-hook-form with zod resolver for form validation (used by shadcn/ui Form component)

subcommands.name: npm install @tanstack/react-table
subcommands.description: Install TanStack Table for the DataTable component pattern

subcommands.name: npm install tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
subcommands.description: Install Tailwind CSS and its peer dependencies

subcommands.name: npm install tailwindcss-animate
subcommands.description: Install Tailwind CSS Animate plugin used by shadcn/ui for component animations

subcommands.name: npm install vaul
subcommands.description: Install vaul drawer library used by the Drawer component

subcommands.name: npm install cmdk
subcommands.description: Install cmdk command menu library used by the Command component
